name: Lobule Perfusion
pi: Uta Dahmen, Matthias König, Tim Ricken, Hans-Michael Tautenhahn
description: 2D FEniCS simulations of hepatic lobule perfusion and drug metabolism (SPT model) at two polynomial orders (p1, p6) and a scan-based mesh (scan_64). Fields include pressure, substrate, product, necrosis, and protein zonation.
